1642290.name: Aaliyah Edwards
1642290.injDetail: Edwards is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Mercury due to a right knee injury.

1629501.name: Alanna Smith
1629501.injDetail: Smith (leg) is doubtful for Sunday's game against the Sparks.

1642800.name: Aneesah Morrow
1642800.injDetail: Morrow (reconditioning) is listed as questionable for Sunday's game against the Mercury.

1641695.name: Ashten Prechtel
1641695.injDetail: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Washington.

1628280.name: Brionna Jones
1628280.injDetail: Jones (knee) is probable for Sunday's game against Chicago.

203398.name: Brittney Griner
203398.injDetail: Griner is probable for Sunday's game in Phoenix due to a rib injury.

1628279.name: Brittney Sykes
1628279.injDetail: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Sykes (foot) has taken part in individual work at practice recently, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

1643488.name: Emma Cechova
1643488.injDetail: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

1629496.name: Ezi Magbegor
1629496.injDetail: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.

1641683.name: Holly Winterburn
1641683.injDetail: Winterburn is out for Saturday's game versus Minnesota due to personal reasons.

1643505.name: Jovana Nogic
1643505.injDetail: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

1642794.name: Juste Jocyte
1642794.injDetail: Jocyte is out for Saturday's game against the Mystics due to left foot soreness.

1628317.name: Karlie Samuelson
1628317.injDetail: Samuelson (finger) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

1628276.name: Kelsey Plum
1628276.injDetail: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

1630461.name: Kiana Williams
1630461.injDetail: Williams (hand) is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Wings.

1631006.name: Kierstan Bell
1631006.injDetail: Bell has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Fever due to a right leg injury.

1643445.name: Kiki Rice
1643445.injDetail: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Rice (ankle) has progressed to doing non-contact work at practice but is doubtful to return before the All-Star break, Zulfi Sheikh of

1630142.name: Leonie Fiebich
1630142.injDetail: Fiebich (foot) currently doesn't have a timetable to return, Jackie Powell of The IX Sports reports.

1642820.name: Liatu King
1642820.injDetail: King (coach's decision) is out for Saturday's game versus Portland.

1629546.name: Marine Johannes
1629546.injDetail: Johannes (ankle) exited Saturday's 108-88 loss to the Fever in the fourth quarter and did not return, finishing with 12 points (4-12 FG, 4-11 3Pt), two rebounds, one assist and one

1629484.name: Megan Gustafson
1629484.injDetail: Gustafson (personal) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

1631039.name: Miela Sowah
1631039.injDetail: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Washington.

1630442.name: Natasha Mack
1630442.injDetail: Mack (foot) is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Sun.

1642288.name: Rickea Jackson
1642288.injDetail: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

1628244.name: Sami Whitcomb
1628244.injDetail: Whitcomb (knee) is probable for Sunday's game versus the Sun.

1642790.name: Sania Feagin
1642790.injDetail: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

1642809.name: Saniya Rivers
1642809.injDetail: Rivers (ankle) is probable for Sunday's game in Phoenix.

203400.name: Skylar Diggins
203400.injDetail: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

1643444.name: Ta'Niya Latson
1643444.injDetail: Latson (coach's decision) won't play Sunday against the Fever.

1643473.name: Taina Mair
1643473.injDetail: Mair (coach's decision) is listed out for Friday's game against Indiana.

1642804.name: Te-Hina Paopao
1642804.injDetail: Paopao (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.
